issues.description: Text states '[Opponent's Turn] This Character gains +2000 power.' Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'. Per duration rules, 'opponent's turn' in text requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn'.

Blocker ability text '(After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)' is a static ability, not a triggered action. OnBlock trigger with Rest action misrepresents the mechanic—Blocker is a keyword that grants the ability to intercept attacks, not an action that fires. This effect should be removed or restructured as a keyword grant, not an action trigger.
